title: Blue Hen RE platform hub
text: The hub orchestrates ASN lifecycle tiles, experiment ledger, and fleet site map. Each mini-org shares core-api with workspace isolation via Postgres RLS.

title: Four-stage lifecycle
text: Collect via data harvester, train via training orchestrator, applied test via QA benchmark, deploy via field operator. One trace spans all stages per objective.

title: Synthetic organization agent
text: Eve Chief of Staff at apps/synthorg delegates across fleet sites using synth-core tools only. Pair-programming context comes from config/fleet.json.

title: Workspace cost ceiling
text: RESEARCH_COST_CEILING_USD_PER_DAY enforces per-tenant spend before GPU jobs enqueue. Budget widget on hub reads live from core-api /v1/budget.

title: Experiment ledger
text: Append-only ledger records stage, model version, metric delta, and trace id. Auto-research conductor reads weakest slice from recent entries.

title: jcamd control plane
text: Operator opens jcamd.com for fleet map, core-api health, and dev commands per site. FleetShell nav links localhost ports when NEXT_PUBLIC_FLEET_LOCAL=1.

title: ASN shared engine
text: All tenants share asn-engine code; data is sovereign. Matryoshka truncation and int8 quantization make org embeddings cheap at the edge.

title: Spec-driven development
text: Code traces to specs/0001-0006. ML changes require eval gates in CI — WHITEPAPER claims become falsifiable tests, not prose.
